problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: If Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics is applied to alphafold, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
